rewrite.rewritten: Qatar has announced the launch of a new event, with the Ministry of Culture and Sports highlighting that it is expected to attract a large number of attendees. The event is anticipated to be one of the most significant in the country this year, with an impressive line-up of participants.
changes_summary: Replaced 'launching a huge new event' with 'announced the launch of a new event' and added attribution to the Ministry of Culture and Sports.
Replaced 'it's going to be amazing' with 'highlighting that it is expected to attract a large number of attendees'.
Replaced 'one of the biggest things this year' with 'one of the most significant in the country this year'.
Replaced 'You won't believe how cool the line-up is' with 'with an impressive line-up of participants'.
added_attributions: the Ministry of Culture and Sports

rewrite.rewritten: Qatar Living has announced the launch of a new platform designed to enhance the online shopping experience for consumers across the country. The platform, according to Qatar Living, aims to provide a streamlined and efficient service for users.
changes_summary: Removed casual and hype language ('SUPER excited', 'game-changing', 'revolutionize', 'mind-blowing', 'must-see').
Replaced first-person plural with institutional third-person ('Qatar Living has announced').
Toned down claims from 'revolutionize' to 'enhance' and 'streamlined and efficient service'.

rewrite.rewritten: Qatar Airways has announced the resumption of flights to Helsinki and Tokyo, highlighting the airline's continued expansion across global markets.
changes_summary: Replaced casual language with formal, institutional tone.
Removed personal opinion and exclamatory phrases.
Added attribution to Qatar Airways for the announcement.
